mapper.select: SELECT ERROR_CODE AS errorCode, LOCALE_CODE AS localeCode, ERROR_TITLE AS errorTitle, PB_ERROR_TITLE AS pbErrorTitle, ETC_ERROR_TITLE AS etcErrorTitle, ERROR_CAUSE_DESC AS errorCauseDesc, ERROR_GUIDE_DESC AS errorGuideDesc, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId, HELP_PAGE_URL AS helpPageUrl, IBS_ERROR_GUIDE_DESC AS ibsErrorGuideDesc, CMS_ERROR_GUIDE_DESC AS cmsErrorGuideDesc, ETC_ERROR_GUIDE_DESC AS etcErrorGuideDesc FROM FWK_ERROR_DESC WHERE ERROR_CODE = #{errorCode} AND LOCALE_CODE = #{localeCode}

SELECT ERROR_CODE AS errorCode, LOCALE_CODE AS localeCode, ERROR_TITLE AS errorTitle, PB_ERROR_TITLE AS pbErrorTitle, ETC_ERROR_TITLE AS etcErrorTitle, ERROR_CAUSE_DESC AS errorCauseDesc, ERROR_GUIDE_DESC AS errorGuideDesc, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId, HELP_PAGE_URL AS helpPageUrl, IBS_ERROR_GUIDE_DESC AS ibsErrorGuideDesc, CMS_ERROR_GUIDE_DESC AS cmsErrorGuideDesc, ETC_ERROR_GUIDE_DESC AS etcErrorGuideDesc FROM FWK_ERROR_DESC WHERE ERROR_CODE = #{errorCode} ORDER BY LOCALE_CODE
mapper.update: UPDATE FWK_ERROR_DESC SET ERROR_TITLE = #{dto.errorTitle}, PB_ERROR_TITLE = #{dto.pbErrorTitle, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ETC_ERROR_TITLE = #{dto.etcErrorTitle, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ERROR_CAUSE_DESC = #{dto.errorCauseDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ERROR_GUIDE_DESC = #{dto.errorGuideDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME = #{lastUpdateDtime}, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID = #{lastUpdateUserId}, HELP_PAGE_URL = #{dto.helpPageUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IBS_ERROR_GUIDE_DESC = #{dto.ibsErrorGuideDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CMS_ERROR_GUIDE_DESC = #{dto.cmsErrorGuideDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ETC_ERROR_GUIDE_DESC = #{dto.etcErrorGuideDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE ERROR_CODE = #{errorCode} AND LOCALE_CODE = #{localeCode}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM FWK_ERROR_DESC WHERE ERROR_CODE = #{errorCode} AND LOCALE_CODE = #{localeCode}
